candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; exact top-line and matches sales values.
Also a direct revenue/sales line and appears identical to Total Revenue; useful as alternate label across years.
Operating income but not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list of revenue labels; both are valid top-line labels and appear numerically identical in the preview.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / COGS line.
Explicit SG&A line; strongest semantic match even though preview values are blank.
Personnel overhead component and good SG&A component coverage.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in the preview, so per instructions it is included along with populated overhead components to improve year coverage. Excluded Other expenses and D&A lines because they are less clearly SG&A or explicitly excluded.
No dedicated research/development row is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; best single finance-cost measure without double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component, but appears to be part of total interest expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of the same lease-interest item; should not be combined with total interest expenses.

variables.notes: Selected the single total interest expense row to avoid double counting against lease-interest component disclosures.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; more specific than Total Equity and no separate parent/NCI split is shown on the balance sheet.
Also valid total equity line but redundant with Shareholders' Equity - Total.

variables.notes: No separate owners/parent equity or non-controlling interest line is shown on the balance sheet, so total shareholders' equity is the best available BE measure.

candidates.why: Income-statement attribution item, not the preferred balance-sheet NCI stock measure.
Income-statement attribution item, not the preferred balance-sheet NCI stock measure.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest row is present. Since BE uses total shareholders' equity here, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
